One lobby had 4 the other had like 8-12 and we just fixed the power and this bum goes straight to the crates and starts spamming and when I confronted him he basically said I can’t do anything since he’s a beta tester so Kong check your bumahh mods and update the game

Dear kong,
My friends and I have played your game for months. We have made around 15 videos on it, all getting around 2k each. We enjoy your game very much, and in all of our opinions this is 100% the best horror VR game. If you update the game more and add new things, this game will most likley be in the top 50 games.
signed- Luke

Everyone join this game it’s really, really, really good. While the graphics and gameplay are good, I don’t understand how to purchase the cosmetics on the machine, as it just displays them on a dummy. Another thing, the game would be better if it had more players. Like I enjoyed the horror mode a little bit? But there was only like two other ‘kongs’ in the server. If the game had more advertisement it would be a lot better (e.g more content creators). But that’s all I have to say. Good game just needs a bigger fandom / player base

reviews.review_title: Best Gorilla-Tag-like game on the market
reviews.review_description:
Kong is the start of making fan-games GOOD. It's original, the countdown mode and new horror mode is more fun than Gorilla Tag and its clones. All that's needed is more players. Hopefully we can move on from the same garbage slop given to players in every Gorilla Tag-like game and start creating higher quality products such as Kong. 

I've supported Trout all through development of this game, knowing he'd make quality product, and now it's available to everyone. Please check it out, it'll only get better with time.

Boring, virtually nothing, glitchy, I don’t care what the other reviews say that “it’s being worked on” I don’t care. I’m deleting it. I only did five so trout would read, heck I’m Going to give it one star. I don’t understand why some people say they like the water physics, it’s just low gravity and you can’t  swim or anything in it. When it’s finally actually going to be an even slightly more enjoyable I’m going to redownload it and see what four pixels were added to the small little map. The way it seems to be going it’s going to get rid of something and add some gen alpha targeted map. Try block coding methods, it will actually make something better than this, this game sucks. Try actually making a game work instead of making really good graphics to the point it doesn’t even look good anymore since there’s like four poly in the game, get better, graduate from second grade and touch grass.       🫳
              🌱🌱🌱🌱🌱🌱🌱🌱

While often surface level and occasionally confusing, Kong still manages to deliver an interactive, creepy, and sometimes hilariously chaotic experience. It’s surprisingly engaging, especially in private lobbies, where playing with friends brings out the game’s true potential.

developer_response.body: Sorry for not making it to clear in-game, but when you leave a lobby you can always walk out the door into horror and get into a new pub instead of loading the scene again. Hope this helps :)

reviews.review_description:
The game is really good game and the horror mode is really well made with the monsters and the map.
Let me tell you about the horror mode game:your a worker in a mining facility and you got to collect goop but the monsters are protecting it and the big drill is what’s keeping all the power Running and once the powers gone it becomes harder

Honestly, this game did all that gorilla tag got right and MORE. Sometimes glitchy and dead, but when you play it's fun and it looks good!!  I spent 10 minutes playing in the water to see the waves, (not because I'm just a creep for that stuff) but because it was just fun! The water isn't as a bad physics bunch like g tag, and that's coming from a gorilla tag YouTuber of all things! (Also sub to JolterGT) So just get Kong. Just do it.
